title: Flavorful Argentinian Beef Empanadas
description: A kid-friendly Argentinian dish featuring beef and tamarind paste, wrapped in banana leaves for a fun and flavorful snack. This recipe is anti-inflammatory friendly and incorporates umami flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground beef, tamarind paste, nuka pickle, onion, salt, and black pepper, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
Cut the banana leaves into 6-inch squares and brush with olive oil.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture onto the center of each banana leaf square.
Fold the banana leaf over the filling to form a triangle or square shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each empanada.
Bake the empanadas for 20 minutes, or until the banana leaves are slightly browned and the filling is cooked through.
Serve the empanadas warm, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
